title: Gate OpenAI persistent WebSocket attempts
goal: Ensure OpenAI persistent WebSocket continuation is covered by the same rate-limit cooldown and concurrency backpressure gates as fresh HTTPS/SSE attempts.
completionConditions: OpenAI provider applies rate-limit cooldown and provider/model concurrency permit before attempting persistent WebSocket continuation.
The normal fresh connection retry loop continues to run under the same acquired permit without duplicating cooldown/backpressure logic.
A focused structural regression test verifies the gate appears before persistent WebSocket continuation.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Follow-up to provider concurrency backpressure slice. Keep scope to OpenAI gate ordering only.
